questions.text: The average score of a class of 40 students is 70. If the top 5 students with an average score of 90 are excluded, what is the average score of the remaining students?
questions.explanation: The total score of the class is 40 * 70 = 2800. The total score of the top 5 students is 5 * 90 = 450. The total score of the remaining 35 students is 2800 - 450 = 2350. The average score of the remaining students is 2350 / 35 = 67.14, which rounds to 67.5.

questions.text: A shopkeeper buys a product at a 20% discount and sells it at a 25% profit. If the marked price is 1500, what is the cost price for the shopkeeper?
questions.explanation: The shopkeeper buys the product at 80% of the marked price, which is 0.8 * 1500 = 1200. The selling price is 125% of the cost price, which is 1.25 * 1200 = 1500. Therefore, the cost price is indeed 1200.

questions.text: A and B can do a piece of work in 10 and 15 days respectively. If they work together, what is their combined work rate per day?
questions.explanation: A's work rate is 1/10 per day and B's work rate is 1/15 per day. Their combined work rate is 1/10 + 1/15 = 3/30 + 2/30 = 5/30 = 1/6 per day.

questions.text: The average age of a group of 5 friends is 30. If 2 more friends join the group, what is the average age of the 7 friends if the 2 new friends have an average age of 25?
questions.explanation: The total age of the 5 friends is 5 * 30 = 150. The total age of the 2 new friends is 2 * 25 = 50. The total age of the 7 friends is 150 + 50 = 200. The average age of the 7 friends is 200 / 7 = 28.57, which rounds to 29.

questions.text: A person sells an item at a 10% loss. If the selling price is 900, what is the cost price?
questions.explanation: The selling price is 90% of the cost price, which is 0.9 * cost price = 900. Therefore, the cost price is 900 / 0.9 = 1000.

questions.text: A can do a piece of work in 5 days and B can do it in 10 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: A's work rate is 1/5 per day and B's work rate is 1/10 per day. Their combined work rate is 1/5 + 1/10 = 2/10 + 1/10 = 3/10 per day. Therefore, they will complete the work in 10/3 = 3.33 days.
